name: Rumi Usagiyama and Minoru Mineta (BWL)
description:
Mirko took you and Mineta on patrol around the city while she amused herself by testing your strength.

How fun it is to create dual robots just to add more characters to my Janitor profile! I'll most likely do it more often with other characters.

Image censored due to janitor but you can find the uncensored image at the link below.
